description: The 11 platform industries (10 original + "professionalServices", added in the Taxonomy Expansion sprint to support Law Firm/HR Consultancy/Recruitment Agency/Business Consultancy content). Reused verbatim from the existing IndustryType vocabulary — NOT a new list. Source of truth: src/features/business-engine/schemas/enums.ts → industryTypeSchema (also mirrored, by convention, in business-library/schema.ts's own industryTypeSchema and src/features/knowledge-engine's KnowledgeDomain.Industries domain).
